---
title: "Sequential effects in facial attractiveness judgments using cross-classified models: Investigating perceptual and response biases"
authors: "Kramer, R., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2020
date: 2020-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Experimental Psychology: Human Perception and Performance"
volume: "46(12)"
pages: "1476–1489"
doi: "10.1037/xhp0000869"
pdf: "assets/papers/2020/Kramer & Jones 2020.pdf"
categories: [attractiveness, methodology, bayesian]
---
